text: In this paper is discussing about the philosophy study, especially about the ontology of TGKH thinking. The studies of M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid about Islamic boarding school education and examining the relevance with the education system in Indonesia. This research uses a descriptive qualitative method with a descriptive analysis approach. Through the research it can be concluded that TGKH has managed to spread the education, guidance and Islamic school education to the people of Lombok at that time through some concepts and methods. So that the people of Lombok have been able to understand and master the teachings of Islam.
explanation: The passage contains mildly awkward phrasing and non-native English patterns, which can be indicative of AI generation, but the highly specific regional topic and plausible research description also suggest human authorship.
